text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day like any other, while Mejiro Ardan and I
are training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Whew... It appears as though we're nearing the end of today's session.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Little by little, I'm beginning to feel the
fruits of these exercises out on the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, perhaps it's my mindset that's truly
changed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I was so desperate to defy fate, I daresay my
practice sessions were more akin to last-ditch
struggles.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Whereas now, I feel as if I am steadily moving
forwards, planting my feet more and more firmly
as I do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now then, perhaps a brief run is in order?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Calmly, earnestly, and steadily. Off I go,
then.
